messages.content: BenchMetrics is seeing CAC climb while LTV flatlines — should I cut paid spend or fix activation first?
Priya framed a classic payback tension at BenchMetrics; finance should speak to the sequence, not just the headline cut.

Priya, for BenchMetrics the honest answer depends on whether CAC inflation is coming from wasted clicks or from a leaky funnel after signup. If payback period stretched because trial-to-paid slipped, shaving paid spend alone won't fix LTV — you'll just starve top of funnel while the activation hole remains. If activation is stable and CAC rose because bids got expensive, then a staged cut with a holdout geo makes sense. I'd want one chart: weekly CAC, blended and by channel, against activation conversion, before we pick which lever hurts less.
